summary: Wire the AI conversation panel to the active WorkbenchRuntime document, async platform SecretStore, streaming provider bridge, and existing ai-panel edit history command with a stale-document guard.

decisions.decision: Keep the application AI client synchronous at its secret boundary and bridge the platform's async SecretStore in a provider-neutral async generator; configured provider selection is the only condition that exposes requestStream, while applyEdit dispatches an ai-panel command only for the active document.
decisions.rationale: This preserves zero fetch calls for no-provider state, avoids duplicating provider logic in UI, and prevents a stale proposal from mutating a newly active document.

testEvidence.criterion: The bridge dispatches an accepted proposal only for the active document and the panel/runtime AI tests remain green.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused bridge and panel suites once after wiring Workbench activity content.

red.outcome: RED: the first wiring pass pushed Workbench.tsx to 401 physical lines, violating the 400-line UI policy.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/ai-runtime-bridge.test.ts tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx
green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 2 passed (2); Tests 3 passed (3); Duration 966ms.

testEvidence.criterion: The runtime wiring remains type-safe and source-policy clean after the bounded line-budget correction.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy once after the correction.

red.outcome: RED: source policy reported src/ui/Workbench.tsx at 401 lines.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 427 files in 215ms with source policy passed.

questions: Provider credentials, current-file context toggles, markdown rendering, conversation persistence integration, and hosted clean-browser AI evidence remain beyond this bridge unit; AC-10.c/d are not claimed.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
